title: ammi ehrenbergii
intro: Ammi ehrenbergii, also known as Chinese False Queen Anne's Lace, is an annual herb in the parsley family, native to East Asia and naturalized in other parts of the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ammi ehrenbergii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ammi ehrenbergii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in traditional Chinese medicine as a component in various compound formulas.
